MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-03-2010 Continued To Oct-04-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARCUS JACKSON OF THE STEPHEN, DANZ & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (619) 297-9400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOSEPH A. SCHWACHTER OF THE LITTLER MENDELSON LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 677-3154 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS DELOITTE CONSULTING, LLP AND ROBERT ROSE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS BASED ON HARASSMENT AND DISCRIMINATION BASED ON SEXUAL ORIENTATION IN CAUSES OF ACTION 1, 2 AND 3 IN LIGHT OF THE BOWEN TESTIMONY, THE OBJECTION TO WHICH IS OVERRULED FOR PURPOSES OF THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENIED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 8 BECAUSE WORKERS' COMPENSATION NEED NOT BE THE EXCLUSIVE REMEDY GIVEN THESE SURVIVING CLAIMS. GRANTED AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION 4, 5 AND 6 BECAUSE EVIDENCE OF ALLEGED PRIOR PREMISES CANNOT BE ADMITTED TO CONTRADICT THE TERMS OF THE INTEGRATED WRITTEN OFFER, WHICH WAS WHAT PLAINTIFF RELIED ON EXCLUSIVELY. GRANTED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 7 BECAUSE THE ONLY EVIDENCE ON WHICH PLAINTIFF RELIED IS PROPERLY OBJECTED TO AS HEARSAY AND BECAUSE PLAINTIFF HAS NO EVIDENCE ESTABLISHING A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO FALSITY. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO AGE DISCRIMINATION IS ALSO EXPLICITLY GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). OBJECTIONS WERE RULED ON THE RECORD. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 =(301/PJB)
